mapper.select: SELECT id, title, summary, content, category_id, view_count, created_at, updated_at, deleted_at FROM entry WHERE deleted_at IS NULL AND to_tsvector('simple', title || ' ' || COALESCE(summary, '') || ' ' || COALESCE(content, '')) @@ plainto_tsquery('simple', #{keyword}) ORDER BY ts_rank(to_tsvector('simple', title || ' ' || COALESCE(summary, '') || ' ' || COALESCE(content, '')), plainto_tsquery('simple', #{keyword})) DESC
